content.text:
<recommended_plugins>
Here is a list of plugins that are available but not installed. If the user's query would benefit from one of these plugins, use the `request_plugin_install` tool to suggest that they install it. Pass the parenthesized ID as `plugin_id`. For example, suggest the Google Drive plugin if the query could possibly be better answered with access to Google Drive.

- Atlassian Rovo (atlassian-rovo@openai-curated-remote)
- Box (box@openai-curated-remote)
- Figma (figma@openai-curated-remote)
- Gmail (gmail@openai-curated-remote)
- Google Calendar (google-calendar@openai-curated-remote)
- Google Drive (google-drive@openai-curated-remote)
- Notion (notion@openai-curated-remote)
- Outlook Calendar (outlook-calendar@openai-curated-remote)
- Outlook Email (outlook-email@openai-curated-remote)
- SharePoint (sharepoint@openai-curated-remote)
- Slack (slack@openai-curated-remote)
- Teams (teams@openai-curated-remote)
</recommended_plugins>

Review the code changes against the base branch 'main'. The merge base commit for this comparison is 60dc0766e6704d2de277b6975b03ce722d5f19bc. Run `git diff 60dc0766e6704d2de277b6975b03ce722d5f19bc` to inspect the changes relative to main. Provide prioritized, actionable findings.

input.input: const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"grep -n -E 'branch-diff|code review|60dc076|wrangler' /Users/cysp/.codex/memories/MEMORY.md | head -30; cat /Users/cysp/.agents/skills/code-review/SKILL.md","workdir":"/Users/cysp/src/cyspbot","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":12000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"git rev-parse 60dc0766e6704d2de277b6975b03ce722d5f19bc && git status --short && git log --oneline 60dc0766e6704d2de277b6975b03ce722d5f19bc..HEAD && git diff --stat 60dc0766e6704d2de277b6975b03ce722d5f19bc && git diff --name-only 60dc0766e6704d2de277b6975b03ce722d5f19bc && find .. -maxdepth 2 \\( -name 'AGENTS.md' -o -name 'CONTRIBUTING.md' -o -name 'CODING_STANDARDS.md' \\) -print","workdir":"/Users/cysp/src/cyspbot","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"git diff 60dc0766e6704d2de277b6975b03ce722d5f19bc -- workers/cyspbot-token-exchange/src packages/oidc packages/oidc-issuer-github-actions/src package.json vitest.config.ts","workdir":"/Users/cysp/src/cyspbot","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":40000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"git show 60dc0766:packages/github-actions-oidc/src/github-actions-principal.ts | sed -n '1,240p'; sed -n '1,220p' packages/oidc-issuer-github-actions/test/issuer.test.ts; grep -R \"repository_owner_id\\|immutable\" -n test/token-policy-matching.test.ts | head -50; cat packages/oidc-issuer-github-actions/package.json; cat workers/cyspbot-token-exchange/package.json","workdir":"/Users/cysp/src/cyspbot","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"corepack pnpm exec vitest run test/token-policy-matching.test.ts test/token-policy-rules.test.ts test/token-exchange-worker.test.ts packages/oidc-issuer-github-actions/test/issuer.test.ts && corepack pnpm run check","workdir":"/Users/cysp/src/cyspbot","yield_time_ms":1000,"max_output_tokens":12000}); text(JSON.stringify(r))

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"git diff 60dc0766 -- docs/service-contract.md docs/implementation.md README.md CONTEXT.md; sed -n '1,180p' workers/cyspbot-token-exchange/src/token-exchange.ts; sed -n '1,180p' workers/cyspbot-token-exchange/src/policy/token-policy.ts","workdir":"/Users/cysp/src/cyspbot","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"grep -n -C 5 'owner ID\\|owner_id\\|repository_id' test/token-policy-matching.test.ts | head -180; git diff --check 60dc0766; corepack pnpm exec tsc --noEmit --pretty false 2>&1 | head -100","workdir":"/Users/cysp/src/cyspbot","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output)

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"grep -R \"github-actions-oidc\" -n --exclude-dir=.git --exclude='pnpm-lock.yaml' --exclude-dir=.pnpm-store . | head -100; grep -n \"immutable\" test/token-policy-matching.test.ts; sed -n '1,220p' test/support/token-policy-fixtures.ts","workdir":"/Users/cysp/src/cyspbot","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":25000}); text(r.output)
